arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta urges Arenal to ‘step up’ as focus switches to Champions League
arts.sum: Arsenal are now 13 points behind champions-elect Liverpool after a goalless draw at Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Nuno Espirito Santo surely has to consider dropping £8.5m star for Nottingham Forest’s next game - opinion
'Our fans are amazing for us' - Nuno after Forest draw with Arsenal
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest boss Nuno Espirito Santo praises teh City Ground fans for giving "extra legs to the players" as they draw 0-0 with Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Liverpool WILL be champions as unsung heroes make Arsenal pay - 5 talking points
arts.sum: LIVERPOOL 2-0 NEWCASTLE UNITED: Liverpool extended their lead at the top of the Premier League table to 13 points thanks to victory at Anfield and Arsenal's failure at Nottingham Forest - we might as well crown them now!

arts.ttl: Arsenal hand advantage to Liverpool in title race as Man City edge past Spurs
arts.sum: The Gunners were held to a goalless draw at the City Ground and dropped further behind the league leaders

arts.ttl: 'There is a danger': Martin Keown now worrying Arsenal are at risk of something worse than just not winning PL title after tonight
arts.sum: Arsenal have dropped yet more points as their pursuit of the Premier League title appears to be fizzling out. The Gunners fell to 11 points...

arts.ttl: Declan Rice angrily confronts Gabriel after Arsenal see title hopes burn out at Forest
arts.sum: A frustrated Declan Rice confronted Arsenal team-mate Gabriel after the Gunners were held to a goalless draw at Nottingham Forest, leaving them 13 points adrift of leaders Liverpool

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta confirms Champions League blow with Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Martinelli injury timeline
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta does not expect Arsenal to have Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Martinelli back until after next month’s international break.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea eye PSG transfer guru as Osimhen tells Man Utd 'come and get me': FT recap
arts.sum: Plus, Man Utd were told what Victor Osimhen's stance on a potential move is and Arsenal made a decision on whether to turn Raheem Sterling's loan from Chelsea permanent. Arsenal and Chelsea eye PSG transfer guru as Osimhen tells Man Utd 'come and get me': FT recap

arts.ttl: Blunted Arsenal grind to a halt in grating stalemate at Nottingham Forest
arts.athr: Peter Lansley at the City Ground
arts.sum: These teams may be separated by only one place in the Premier League table but the emotions released by players, coaches and fans at the end of this entertaining draw showed just how far apart their ambitions lie. Arsenal are resigned to just Champions League qualification; Nottingham Forest, in contrast, are intoxicated at the tantalising prospect of it. Arsenal’s title challenge started running down as their striking department fell into the treatment room in mid-winter but gaining one point from two games against West Ham and Forest seems to have killed it off completely. Continue reading...
